command:
cd /home/jose/moreno-ai

echo '=== CURRENT STATE ==='
git log --oneline -4
git status

echo '=== MOVE main BRANCH TO AMENDMENT COMMIT ==='
AMENDMENT_SHA=$(git rev-parse HEAD)
echo "Amendment commit: $AMENDMENT_SHA"
git branch -f main $AMENDMENT_SHA
git checkout main

echo '=== VERIFY ==='
git log --oneline -4
git branch -v

echo '=== PUSH main ==='
git push origin main 2>&1

echo '=== PUSH TAG (force, it was already there as old SHA) ==='
git push origin constitution-v1.1-amendment-A --force 2>&1

echo '=== FINAL STATE ON GITEA ==='
git log origin/main --oneline -4

echo DONE_1906
